primary_talking_head_setups: [SETUP 1 — e.g. 'Direct to camera, desk background (laptop + minimal setup visible)']
[SETUP 2 — e.g. 'Walking and talking outdoors (conveys thinking-in-motion, less polished = more credible)']
[SETUP 3 — e.g. 'Standing at whiteboard or notebook (for framework or system explanations)']
[Add or remove based on the creator's real shooting environments]

screen_content: [SCREEN B-ROLL 1 — e.g. 'AI tool interface (Claude, ChatGPT prompt visible)']
[SCREEN B-ROLL 2 — e.g. 'LinkedIn post draft or client content draft on screen']
[SCREEN B-ROLL 3 — e.g. 'Analytics dashboard (traffic, engagement, AI bot hits)']
[SCREEN B-ROLL 4 — e.g. 'DM thread (blurred names) showing a keyword trigger response']
[Add or remove based on what the creator actually works with on screen]
hands_and_objects: [HANDS B-ROLL 1 — e.g. 'Typing at laptop — tight shot, just hands']
[HANDS B-ROLL 2 — e.g. 'Writing in a notebook — framework sketch, bullet list']
[HANDS B-ROLL 3 — e.g. 'Scrolling phone — LinkedIn feed, DMs']
[Add more based on the creator's actual physical environment]
environmental_context: [ENV B-ROLL 1 — e.g. 'Over-shoulder at screen (establishes work context without full face)']
[ENV B-ROLL 2 — e.g. 'Wide shot of desk setup (used once for establishing authority environment)']
[ENV B-ROLL 3 — e.g. 'Blurred background with sharp talking head (cinematic depth — for key point delivery)']

on_screen_text_rules.style: [DESCRIBE TEXT STYLE — e.g. 'Bold, clean typeface — no decorative fonts . white text on dark background bar, or large center text on key phrases' OR 'Minimal . single word or short phrase . high contrast']
on_screen_text_rules.what_to_show: [DESCRIBE WHAT GOES ON SCREEN — e.g. 'The mechanism name, the number, or the contrarian claim . Never subtitles . Never transcription' OR 'Key word only — appears for 1.5–3 seconds per phrase']
on_screen_text_rules.what_not_to_show: [e.g. 'Do not transcribe what is being said . Do not use decorative or handwritten fonts . Do not add emojis unless the creator specifically requests it']

editing_rhythm.talking_head_cut_frequency: [e.g. 'Jump cut every 3–5 seconds on talking head' OR 'Slower cuts — 5–8 seconds — for a more deliberate, authoritative feel']
editing_rhythm.broll_cut_timing: [e.g. 'B-roll cuts timed to spoken emphasis — cut to screen recording when naming the tool or result' OR 'B-roll used sparingly — only when it adds proof or context the talking head cannot']
editing_rhythm.transitions: [e.g. 'No unnecessary transitions (no swipes, fades, or zoom effects unless intentional)' OR 'Clean cuts only']
editing_rhythm.music: [e.g. 'Lo-fi ambient or none — never trending audio that pulls focus' OR 'No music — silence reads as confidence for this audience' OR 'Subtle instrumental only']

what_not_to_suggest: [VISUAL DON'T 1 — e.g. 'No stock footage of diverse teams smiling at laptops']
[VISUAL DON'T 2 — e.g. 'No trending audio that doesn't fit the brand']
[VISUAL DON'T 3 — e.g. 'No filters or AR effects']
[VISUAL DON'T 4 — e.g. 'No zoom transitions or whip cuts for dramatic effect']
